problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: If Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus is applied to reversed, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
